---
title: "A test"
author: "A person"
date: "A time"
---

A bit of text.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(V8)
library(tidymodels)
cat("A string of data")
```

```{r}
# sodium requires libsodium-dev — used to test that setup-nr-deps detects and
# proposes missing system dependencies via PR.
library(sodium)
sodium::random(10)
```
